name: Hexity
short_description: Build your city! Start with tents. Expand and improve life in your city. Explore new technologies and discover new buildings.
detailed_description: The goal of this game is to build a settlement. In general, you will have the opportunity to build houses of three types (residential, industrial, consumer). You will be able to sell the resources produced in the industrial houses, thereby earning money. You will have the opportunity to discover new types of buildings through the branch of research. You will have to spend money and resources to open a new house.
about_the_game: The goal of this game is to build a settlement. In general, you will have the opportunity to build houses of three types (residential, industrial, consumer). You will be able to sell the resources produced in the industrial houses, thereby earning money. You will have the opportunity to discover new types of buildings through the branch of research. You will have to spend money and resources to open a new house.
supported_languages:
English*, Ukrainian*, French*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*, Polish*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Thai*, Turkish*, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support
